# {{.Project}}

Project stack managed by [devtools](../../README.md).

## First-time setup

```bash
# .env was generated by `dev new` — edit if needed (PROJECT, DEVTOOLS_TAG).
dev init-shared         # once per host — creates + seeds shared volumes
dev up {{.Project}}     # compose up -d
dev shell {{.Project}}
# Inside the container, on first run:
claude login            # auth is scoped to this project only
```

## Daily use

```bash
dev shell {{.Project}}   # exec into the tools container
dev logs  {{.Project}}   # tail service logs
dev down  {{.Project}}   # stop (volumes preserved)
```

## Updating the toolbox

```bash
dev bump {{.Project}}                  # pin to today's date tag
dev bump {{.Project}} --tag 2026-04-23 # pin to a specific date
dev up   {{.Project}}                  # pick up the new image
```

## Adding runtimes

Drop a `.mise.toml` at the root of `/code` (start from `.mise.toml.example`).
mise auto-installs the declared versions on next shell activation.
